chunks.text: This quick exam allows our team to make sure your child’s smile is starting on the right track, plus we can give you tips on how to take care of their incoming teeth. When should my child visit the dentist for the first time. Our dentists (along with the American Academy of Pediatric Dentists) recommend that every child should have their first dental appointment scheduled as soon as their first tooth appears, or no later than their first birthday.

We actually give people a reason to look forward to visiting the dentist. All-Digital & Safe Dentistry Just like you, your child’s safety is our primary concern. Our dental office has long upgraded to fully-digital X-rays, which are not only faster and sharper than traditional film, but the process emits 90% LESS radiation as well, meaning you can breathe easy.
